codeReview.summary: Implementation covers the feature scope: typed content schema, deterministic newest-first sorting with slug tie-breaker, metadata rendering on /blog, explicit-vs-fallback reading-time behavior, empty-state handling, and list-to-slug navigation scaffolding. One non-blocking edge case was identified in schema validation.

issues.description: `readingTime` is validated with `z.string().min(1).optional()` but not trimmed. A whitespace-only frontmatter value (e.g., "   ") passes schema, then `getReadingTime` returns it verbatim, which can render visually blank reading-time metadata and conflict with VAL-BLOG-LIST-003's non-blank metadata intent. Prefer `z.string().trim().min(1).optional()`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Windows/WSL path translation for invoking `.factory/init.sh` via bash is not documented in shared guidance; the worker spent retries on failing path forms before using the working `/mnt/c/...` path.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for session adfcb24f-1d64-46a4-8a2a-bccfed5f28dc shows failed executes: `bash "C:\\Users\\...\\.factory\\init.sh"` and `bash /c/Users/.../.factory/init.sh` (No such file), followed by successful `bash /mnt/c/Users/.../.factory/init.sh`.

summary: Pass with one non-blocking issue: feature behavior aligns with blog list/content-model assertions, but readingTime schema should trim whitespace-only values to avoid blank metadata rendering.
